description: A 12-second 16:9 data infographic — animated bar + line chart with staggered category reveal, NYT-style serif headline, footnote source, kinetic value labels. Built directly on the HyperFrames `data-chart` catalog block.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 12秒 16:9 数据信息图表——动态条形图和折线图结合，分类逐级显示，纽约时报风格衬线标题，数据来源注脚，动态数值标签。基于 HyperFrames `data-chart` 目录模块构建。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 12秒 16:9 資料資訊圖表——動態長條圖與折線圖結合，分類逐級顯示，紐約時報風格襯線標題，資料來源註腳，動態數值標籤。基於 HyperFrames `data-chart` 目錄模組建構。
description_i18n.ja: 12秒の16:9データインフォグラフィック——アニメーション棒グラフと折れ線グラフ、段階的なカテゴリー表示、NYTスタイルのセリフ見出し、出典の脚注、動的な値ラベル。HyperFrames `data-chart` カタログブロック上に直接構築。
description_i18n.ko: 12초 16:9 데이터 인포그래픽 — 애니메이션 막대 및 꺾은선 차트, 단계별 카테고리 표시, NYT 스타일 세리프 헤드라인, 출처 각주, 동적 값 레이블 포함. HyperFrames `data-chart` 카탈로그 블록 기반 구축.
description_i18n.de: 12-sekündige 16:9-Dateninfografik — animierte Balken- und Liniendiagramme mit gestaffelter Kategorienanzeige, NYT-Serifenschlagzeile, Quellenangabe als Fußnote und dynamische Wertbeschriftungen. Direkt auf dem HyperFrames `data-chart`-Katalogblock aufgebaut.
description_i18n.fr: Infographie de données de 12 secondes en 16:9 — graphiques à barres et courbes animés avec révélation échelonnée des catégories, titre en police serif style NYT, source en note de bas de page, étiquettes de valeurs dynamiques. Construit directement sur le bloc catalogue `data-chart` de HyperFrames.
description_i18n.ru: 12-секундная инфографика данных 16:9 — анимированные столбчатые и линейные диаграммы с поэтапным раскрытием категорий, заголовок с засечками в стиле NYT, сноска с источником, динамические подписи значений. Построено на основе каталожного блока HyperFrames `data-chart`.
description_i18n.es: Infografía de datos de 12 segundos en 16:9 — gráficos animados de barras y líneas con revelación escalonada de categorías, titular serif estilo NYT, nota al pie de fuente, etiquetas de valores dinámicas. Construido directamente sobre el bloque de catálogo `data-chart` de HyperFrames.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Infográfico de dados de 12 segundos em 16:9 — gráficos animados de barras e linhas com revelação escalonada de categorias, título em serif estilo NYT, nota de rodapé com fonte, rótulos de valores dinâmicos. Construído diretamente sobre o bloco de catálogo `data-chart` do HyperFrames.
description_i18n.it: Infografica dati di 12 secondi in 16:9 — grafici a barre e a linee animati con rivelazione scaglionata delle categorie, titolo serif in stile NYT, nota a piè di pagina con fonte, etichette di valori dinamiche. Costruito direttamente sul blocco catalogo `data-chart` di HyperFrames.
description_i18n.vi: Infographic dữ liệu 12 giây tỷ lệ 16:9 — biểu đồ cột và đường động với hiển thị danh mục xen kẽ, tiêu đề serif phong cách NYT, chú thích nguồn, nhãn giá trị động. Xây dựng trực tiếp trên khối danh mục `data-chart` của HyperFrames.
description_i18n.pl: 12-sekundowa infografika danych w formacie 16:9 — animowane wykresy słupkowe i liniowe z rozłożonym w czasie ujawnianiem kategorii, nagłówek w czcionce szeryfowej w stylu NYT, przypis ze źródłem, dynamiczne etykiety wartości. Zbudowany bezpośrednio na bloku katalogowym `data-chart` HyperFrames.
description_i18n.id: Infografis data 12 detik 16:9 — grafik batang dan garis animasi dengan pengungkapan kategori bertahap, judul serif gaya NYT, catatan kaki sumber, label nilai dinamis. Dibangun langsung di atas blok katalog `data-chart` HyperFrames.
description_i18n.nl: 12 seconden durende 16:9 data-infographic — geanimeerde staaf- en lijndiagrammen met gefaseerde categorie-onthulling, NYT-stijl schreefhoofdlijn, voetnoot met bron, dynamische waardelabels. Direct gebouwd op het HyperFrames `data-chart`-catalogusblok.
description_i18n.ar: رسم معلوماتي للبيانات مدته 12 ثانية بنسبة 16:9 — رسوم بيانية شريطية وخطية متحركة مع عرض متدرج للفئات، عنوان رئيسي بخط serif بأسلوب NYT، حاشية سفلية للمصدر، تسميات قيم ديناميكية. مبني مباشرة على كتلة كتالوج `data-chart` من HyperFrames.
description_i18n.tr: 12 saniyelik 16:9 veri infografiği — kademeli kategori gösterimi ile animasyonlu çubuk ve çizgi grafikler, NYT tarzı serif başlık, dipnot kaynak, dinamik değer etiketleri. Doğrudan HyperFrames `data-chart` katalog bloğu üzerine inşa edilmiştir.
description_i18n.uk: 12-секундна інфографіка даних 16:9 — анімовані стовпчасті та лінійні діаграми з поетапним розкриттям категорій, заголовок із засічками у стилі NYT, виноска з джерелом, динамічні підписи значень. Побудовано безпосередньо на основі каталогового блоку HyperFrames `data-chart`.
description_i18n.en: A 12-second 16:9 data infographic — animated bar + line chart with staggered category reveal, NYT-style serif headline, footnote source, kinetic value labels. Built directly on the HyperFrames `data-chart` catalog block.

query.en:
Build a 12-second HyperFrames data composition (1920×1080, 30fps) showing a 6-bar animated bar-chart race with a NYT-style headline. Pull the catalog block first: `npx hyperframes add data-chart`. Use it as the render surface and override the data via a small JSON inline.

Dataset (provide inline; choose the topic from the user's brief or default to AI labs market share):
• Anthropic — 28%
• OpenAI — 31%
• Google — 18%
• xAI — 9%
• Meta — 8%
• Other — 6%

Visual identity: cream canvas #f5efe4, ink text #161312, single rust accent #b14a2c on the active/leading bar only, hairline rules in #b3a692. Display headline: "Editorial New" or "Tiempos Headline" 84px; deck face "Inter" 22px tracked +1%; mono "JetBrains Mono" 16px for value labels with `font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums`.

Layout:
• Top 18% of canvas — headline (one line, max 64 chars) + a 16px-high deck line below, separated by a hairline rule.
• Middle 64% — the data-chart block, padded 120px left / 80px right.
• Bottom 18% — source line (small caps, tracked +6%) like "source · sec filings · may 2026" and a kinetic ticking timestamp counter (0 → "may 1 2026" using apple-money-count-style logic on a date string is wrong — instead do a clean fade-in at 11.0s).

Animation (12s total):
• 0–0.4s — page hairline rule wipes in from left, ease power3.out.
• 0.3–1.2s — headline rises from y=40 → 0 over 0.7s ease expo.out, then deck line fades in at 0.9s over 0.4s.
• 1.2–9.0s — data-chart block runs its built-in stagger: each bar grows from width 0 → final value over 1.4s, ease power2.out, staggered 180ms per bar; value labels count up tabular-nums at the same easing; the leading bar (`#b14a2c`) gets a 4% scale pulse on landing.
• 9.5–11.5s — annotation callout pointing at the leader: a 360px box with a one-line analysis ("Anthropic narrowed the gap to 3 points") fades + slides in from x=40 over 0.5s.
• 11.5–12s — final hold. Source line fades in. No exit animations (this is the only scene).

Non-negotiables: tabular-nums on every digit; min 16px on data labels; deterministic; entrance-only; all timelines paused:true; root data-duration=12. Run `npx hyperframes inspect --at 1.5,5,9,11.5` to catch any value-label overflow.

Output: `data-chart-race-12s.mp4`.
query.zh-CN:
使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build a 12-second HyperFrames data composition (1920×1080, 30fps) showing a 6-bar animated bar-chart race with a NYT-style headline. Pull the catalog block first: `npx hyperframes add data-chart`. Use it as the render surface and override the data via a small JSON inline.

Dataset (provide inline; choose the topic from the user's brief or default to AI labs market share):
• Anthropic — 28%
• OpenAI — 31%
• Google — 18%
• xAI — 9%
• Meta — 8%
• Other — 6%

Visual identity: cream canvas #f5efe4, ink text #161312, single rust accent #b14a2c on the active/leading bar only, hairline rules in #b3a692. Display headline: "Editorial New" or "Tiempos Headline" 84px; deck face "Inter" 22px tracked +1%; mono "JetBrains Mono" 16px for value labels with `font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums`.

Layout:
• Top 18% of canvas — headline (one line, max 64 chars) + a 16px-high deck line below, separated by a hairline rule.
• Middle 64% — the data-chart block, padded 120px left / 80px right.
• Bottom 18% — source line (small caps, tracked +6%) like "source · sec filings · may 2026" and a kinetic ticking timestamp counter (0 → "may 1 2026" using apple-money-count-style logic on a date string is wrong — instead do a clean fade-in at 11.0s).

Animation (12s total):

• 0.3–1.2s — headline rises from y=40 → 0 over 0.7s ease expo.out, then deck line fades in at 0.9s over 0.4s.
• 1.2–9.0s — data-chart block runs its built-in stagger: each bar grows from width 0 → final value over 1.4s, ease power2.out, staggered 180ms per bar; value labels count up tabular-nums at the same easing; the leading bar (`#b14a2c`) gets a 4% scale pulse on landing.
• 9.5–11.5s — annotation callout pointing at the leader: a 360px box with a one-line analysis ("Anthropic narrowed the gap to 3 points") fades + slides in from x=40 over 0.5s.
• 11.5–12s — final hold. Source line fades in. No exit animations (this is the only scene).

Non-negotiables: tabular-nums on every digit; min 16px on data labels; deterministic; entrance-only; all timelines paused:true; root data-duration=12. Run `npx hyperframes inspect --at 1.5,5,9,11.5` to catch any value-label overflow.

Output: `data-chart-race-12s.mp4`.
